basic_details.job_title: Engineers India Limited Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for Associate Engineer on Fixed Term Basis
basic_details.post_name: Associate Engineer Grade II & Grade III
basic_details.short_information: This section gives you a quick snapshot of the key details of the Engineers India Limited Fixed Term Engineer Recruitment 2026 so you can immediately assess whether this opportunity is right for you.

important_dates.raw: The walk-in interview for EIL Recruitment 2026 is scheduled across major cities in India, providing candidates from various regions a convenient opportunity to appear. This section covers the tentative timeline and the cities where interviews will be held. | Tentative Interview Start Date: 13 July 2026 Exact Date: Will be communicated separately via the candidate's registered email ID Interview Cities: Gurugram, Kolkata, Mumbai, Chennai, Bengaluru, and Vadodara Interview Timing: Interviews may be held up to 8:00 PM on the same day and, if required, continued the next day. Candidates must make their own arrangements for accommodation. | Candidates based in Chennai will have the option to attend their interview locally, making this a convenient opportunity for Tamil Nadu-based engineers.

qualification.details: Understanding the eligibility conditions for EIL Recruitment 2026 is crucial before you proceed to apply, as failing to meet even one criterion can lead to disqualification at any stage of the process. | All candidates must hold a B.E. / B.Tech. / B.Sc (Engineering) degree in the relevant discipline from a recognized university or institution, with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA. The exact CGPA equivalents are as follows: | Note: Round off percentage to the lower whole number (e.g., 60.9 = 60) and CGPA to the lower decimal (e.g., 6.95 = 6.9). | Associate Engineer Grade II: Minimum 5 years of post-qualification relevant experience Associate Engineer Grade III: Minimum 9 years of post-qualification relevant experience The cut-off date for experience calculation is 31 May 2026 | Associate Engineer Grade II: Maximum 37 years as on 31 May 2026 Associate Engineer Grade III: Maximum 41 years as on 31 May 2026

salary_details.details: One of the most attractive aspects of this EIL recruitment is the competitive consolidated monthly remuneration, which varies by city category and grade. The pay package includes HRA and PF components. | Beyond the monthly consolidated pay, EIL also provides a set of value-added benefits to all fixed term engineers: | Medical Insurance: Reimbursement of Medical Insurance Premium for self, up to ₹2,00,000 per annum Out-of-Pocket Expenses: Reimbursement for working beyond standard working hours GPAI Scheme: Coverage under the Group Personal Accident Insurance Scheme as per Company Policy Travelling Allowance: Payment for official travel outside the place of posting Paid Leave: 2 days of paid leave for each completed month of service

how_to_apply: The application process for EIL Recruitment 2026 is entirely online through the official EIL website. Here is the complete step-by-step guide to apply without errors.
Step 1: Visit the official EIL website career section at http://www.engineersindia.com
Step 2: Read all the instructions on the website carefully before beginning the registration
Step 3: Fill in the online form with all accurate details. Round off your percentage to the lower whole number (e.g., 60.9 → 60) and CGPA to the lower decimal (e.g., 6.95 → 6.9)
Step 4: Keep the following scanned documents ready before you begin:
Passport-size colour photograph in .jpg/.jpeg format (max 75 KB)
Step 5: After submitting the form online, take 6 printouts of the application form, affix a colour photograph on each, and bring them to the walk-in interview
Step 6: Confirm that all details are correct - the cut-off date for experience and age is 31 May 2026
[Apply Online] – Visit https://recruitment.eil.co.in/ between 00:00 hrs on 16 June 2026 and 23:59 hrs on 30 June 2026
[PDF Download Link] – Download the official EIL Recruitment Notification HRD/Rectt./Advt./2026-27/05 from the EIL careers page for complete details.
important_instructions: Before you finalize your application, go through these critical instructions issued by EIL to avoid rejection:

Only candidates who meet all eligibility criteria should apply Candidates wishing to apply for multiple positions must submit separate online applications for each post Your registered email address must remain valid for at least 24 months from the date of application submission, as all correspondence (including interview intimation) will be sent via email Any updates, corrigenda, or clarifications will be published only on www.engineersindia.com - no separate press notifications will be issued Providing wrong or false information will lead to immediate disqualification No travel or stay allowances will be paid by EIL for attending the interview Any legal disputes will be subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Delhi EIL reserves the right to cancel the advertisement or the selection process without assigning any reason

Disclaimer: This article is based solely on the official Engineers India Limited recruitment advertisement (HRD/Rectt./Advt./2026-27/05). Candidates are advised to visit the official EIL website www.engineersindia.com for the latest updates, corrigenda, or changes to the notification. ShareContentpdf

_labels.notification_pdf: Download the official notification for complete details.

all_official_links.label: Download the official notification for complete details.

faq.question: Q1. What is the Engineers India Limited Recruitment 2026 notification number?
faq.answer: The official notification number is HRD/Rectt./Advt./2026-27/05, released by Engineers India Limited for the engagement of experienced engineers on a Fixed Term Basis across multiple engineering disciplines.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Associate Engineers in EIL 2026?
faq.answer: The consolidated monthly remuneration for Associate Engineer Grade II ranges from ₹72,000 to ₹80,000 per month (including HRA & PF), and for Associate Engineer Grade III it ranges from ₹86,400 to ₹96,000 per month, depending on the city category (X/Y/Z).

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for EIL Walk-in Interview 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 30 June 2026 at 23:59 hrs. Applications submitted after this deadline will not be accepted. The portal opens on 16 June 2026 at 00:00 hrs.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum experience required for EIL Fixed Term Engineer Recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a minimum of 5 years of post-qualification relevant experience to apply for Associate Engineer Grade II positions, and a minimum of 9 years for Associate Engineer Grade III positions, calculated as on 31 May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Which disciplines are eligible to apply for EIL 2026?
faq.answer: EIL is recruiting engineers from the following disciplines: Chemical, Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Instrumentation & Control, Environmental/Industrial Pollution Abatement, Metallurgy/Materials/Corrosion. The exact educational qualification requirement varies by position code.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent job at Engineers India Limited?
faq.answer: No. This recruitment is purely on a Fixed Term Basis for an initial period of 2 years, extendable up to a maximum of 3 years from the date of joining. There is no provision for conversion to a permanent/regular appointment in EIL through this engagement.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the selected engineers be posted?
faq.answer: The primary place of posting is the National Capital Region (NCR). However, EIL may post selected engineers anywhere in India or abroad depending on project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. In which cities will the EIL Walk-in Interview 2026 be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Gurugram, Kolkata, Mumbai, Chennai, Bengaluru, and Vadodara. The exact interview location and date will be communicated to candidates via their registered email ID.

faq.question: Q9. Is there age relaxation for OBC/SC/ST candidates in EIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. SC/ST candidates get a relaxation of 5 years, OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates get 3 years, and PwD candidates get relaxations ranging from 10 to 15 years depending on their sub-category.

faq.question: Q10. What is the minimum educational qualification for EIL Fixed Term Engineer posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a B.E. / B.Tech. / B.Sc (Engineering) degree in the relevant discipline with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized university or institution.

faq.answer: The official notification number is HRD/Rectt./Advt./2026-27/05, released by Engineers India Limited for the engagement of experienced engineers on a Fixed Term Basis across multiple engineering disciplines.
